fields.description:
Please create the main API Portal page based on this Figma design:

https://www.figma.com/design/F2lkYCId2xMqcd9RuXL20B/API-Portal?node-id=278-7350&m=dev

Requirements:
- Full page layout with navigation, sidebar, and content
- Responsive design
- Follow UJET design system (Blue: #0271F3)

Tech stack: Next.js 14, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
